memberdef.argsstring: (self, int max_queue_size=1000, int worker_count=2, bool enable_metrics=True)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Initialize event bus.
Args: max_queue_size: Maximum event queue size worker_count: Number of event worker tasks enable_metrics: Track event metrics

memberdef.argsstring: (self, EventTopic topic, EventHandler handler, Optional[Set[P2PEventType]] filter_types=None, Optional[str] filter_peer=None)
memberdef.name: subscribe

para.verbatim:
Subscribe to events on a topic.
Args: topic: Event topic to subscribe to handler: Async event handler function filter_types: Optional event type filter filter_peer: Optional peer ID filter
Returns: EventSubscriber that can be used to unsubscribe

memberdef.argsstring: (self, EventHandler handler, Optional[Set[EventTopic]] filter_topics=None, Optional[Set[P2PEventType]] filter_types=None, Optional[str] filter_peer=None)
memberdef.name: subscribe_all

para.verbatim:
Subscribe to all events (or filtered topics).
Args: handler: Async event handler function filter_topics: Optional topic filter (default: all topics) filter_types: Optional event type filter filter_peer: Optional peer ID filter
Returns: EventSubscriber that can be used to unsubscribe

Unsubscribe a subscriber.
Args: subscriber: The subscriber to remove
Returns: True if subscriber was found and removed

Publish an event.
Args: event: The event to publish
Returns: True if event was queued, False if queue is full

Publish an event and wait for it to be queued.
Args: event: The event to publish

Publish an event without waiting (non-async).
Useful for publishing from sync contexts.
Args: event: The event to publish
Returns: True if event was queued, False otherwise
Call an event handler with error handling

Async event bus for P2P engine.
Provides topic-based event publishing and subscription with async handling and filtering capabilities.
